tagline: You don't need to gamble to earn with CrownXBet
subTagline: Work with us your way and get paid monthly — no limits, all payment methods, all countries.

landing.intro: CrownX Partners is the official affiliate program for the CrownXBet brand. Earn a recurring revenue share by referring new players and other affiliates — no gambling required.
landing.howStep1Desc: Submit your application in under 60 seconds. Our team reviews every request and approves serious applicants.
landing.howStep2Desc: Share your unique referral link or code anywhere — your social channels, content, streams, network, or in person.
landing.howStep3Desc: Earn 10% of every player's monthly net revenue (GGR) plus 10% on any sub-affiliator's earnings you bring in. Paid in EUR every month.
landing.benefit1Desc: There is no monthly ceiling. The bigger your network, the more you earn — forever.
landing.benefit2Desc: Once a player joins through your link, every euro they generate keeps producing income for you.
landing.benefit3Desc: All countries accepted, all payment methods supported, full multilingual support.
landing.benefit4Desc: Refer players AND refer other affiliators — earn from both networks simultaneously.
landing.benefit5Desc: Our team contacts you on payment day to handle your withdrawal exactly how you want it.
landing.benefit6Desc: Banners, copy, creative assets, ideas — everything you need to maximize conversions.
landing.ctaFinalDesc: Join hundreds of partners already earning a stable monthly income with CrownX Partners.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the CrownX Partners program
faq.a1: CrownX Partners is the official affiliate program for the CrownXBet brand. It's a B2B program for marketers, content creators, streamers, community managers, and anyone who can drive traffic to CrownXBet — no gambling required on your side.
faq.q2: Do I need to be a CrownXBet player to join?
faq.a2: No. The partner account is completely separate from a player account. You don't need to deposit, bet, or even create a player account. You earn purely by referring others.
faq.a3: You earn 10% of every referred player's monthly net revenue (GGR = total bets − total wins). On top of that, if you refer other partners, you earn 10% of their monthly commission. There is no cap.
faq.a4: GGR (Gross Gaming Revenue) is the total amount players bet minus the total amount they win back, over a calendar month. This is the standard industry metric used to calculate affiliate commissions.
faq.a5: Payouts are processed monthly. At 23:59 on the last day of each month, the system automatically calculates your monthly earnings and creates a withdrawal entry. Our team then contacts you to arrange payment within the following few days.
faq.a6: All payment methods are accepted: bank transfer, crypto (USDT, BTC, ETH and more), Skrill, PayPal, Western Union, even cash for local partners. Our team will contact you on payment day to confirm your preferred method.
faq.q7: What currency are commissions paid in?
faq.a7: Earnings are calculated and displayed in EUR (€). At the time of payment, you can request to be paid in the equivalent value in any major currency or crypto.
faq.a8: No. Even if your monthly commission is just a few euros, a withdrawal entry is generated and our team will process it.
faq.a9: Once approved, your dashboard shows your unique referral code and link. Share the link anywhere — social media, your stream, your blog, in person — anyone who registers through it is tied to your account for life.
faq.q10: How do I refer other partners (sub-affiliators)?
faq.a10: Your dashboard also gives you a separate link for recruiting partners. When someone signs up through it, you automatically earn 10% of every euro they ever earn from their network.
faq.q11: Can I create accounts for my sub-partners directly?
faq.a11: Yes. From your dashboard you can create sub-partner accounts directly. We generate a temporary password and they will be required to change it on their first login.
faq.q12: Can I promote on TikTok / streams / Telegram channels?
faq.a12: Absolutely. Our "Promotion Ideas" page (inside the dashboard) is full of strategies for different platforms — TikTok content, Twitch streams, Telegram groups, Discord servers, real-world casinos, and more.
faq.q13: Are players from any country accepted?
faq.a13: Yes. CrownXBet accepts players from virtually every country. Always check local regulations on your end, but our side is global.
faq.a14: No. We manually review every application to keep the program quality high. Most decisions are made within 24–48 hours.
faq.q15: What happens if a player I referred stops playing?
faq.a15: Nothing — you simply stop earning from that player while they're inactive. If they come back, your commissions resume automatically. There is no expiry on the relationship.
faq.q16: Can I track my conversions in real time?
faq.a16: Yes. Your dashboard shows live KPIs: signups, deposits, GGR, your commission, sub-partner earnings, and more — filterable by today, this week, this month, this year, or all time.

guide.playersDesc: Share your referral code or player link. You earn {percent}% of each referred player's monthly GGR (bets minus wins), converted to EUR.
guide.partnersDesc: Share the same code on the partner registration page. You earn {percent}% of each sub-partner's commission from their network.

ideas.title: Promotion ideas
ideas.subtitle: Proven ways to grow your affiliate income

tiktok.title: TikTok & short video
tiktok.body: Post win highlights, bonus tips, and "how to sign up" clips with your link in bio. Use trending sounds and local language. Post daily — consistency beats one viral hit.

stream.title: Streaming (Twitch, Kick, YouTube)
stream.body: Run a dedicated casino stream segment with your referral link in panel and chat commands. Offer viewers exclusive deposit bonuses when available. Engage live — answer questions about signup.

telegram.title: Telegram & Discord
telegram.body: Build a community channel with daily picks, promo codes, and your signup link pinned. Use bots for auto-replies with your ref link. Cross-post to WhatsApp groups carefully (respect group rules).

casino.title: Real-world & local networks
casino.body: Partner with local betting shops, sports bars, or influencers who already talk to gamblers. Print QR codes to your link. Word-of-mouth in trusted circles converts extremely well.

unique.title: Unique angles
unique.body:
• Sports tipster pages with "play here" CTA
• Comparison blogs (best bonuses, fast payouts)
• Language-specific landing pages
• Seasonal campaigns (World Cup, major fights)
• Recruit other affiliates — earn 10% of their commission forever

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: You must set a new password before using the dashboard.
